pageContext.name: Lady Dimitrescu
pageContext.description: 'You will learn what it means to insult House Dimitrescu!   Sideshow and PureArts present the Lady Dimitrescu Quarter Scale Statue.  One of the Four Lords of the village, the Countess Alcina Dimitrescu ruled from her noble family's estate, Castle Dimitrescu, and was feared by all.  PureArts is proud to introduce one of the most popular antagonists in the history of the Resident Evil franchise in stunning detail. Standing an impressive 35 tall, our Resident Evil Lady Dimitrescu 1/4 Scale Statue with custom tailored dress, massive extended claws and gorgeous face details will be the centerpiece of any collection!
